scenes.narration: Look! A bright red apple! Red is such a beautiful color!
Wow! A deep blue ocean! Blue is the color of the sky!
See the green grass? Green is the color of nature and trees!
Look up! The yellow sun is shining bright! Yellow is warm and happy!
Yum! A juicy orange fruit! Orange is a yummy color!
Ooh! Beautiful purple grapes! Purple is a magical color!
Aww! Lovely pink flowers! Pink is soft and sweet!
This tall brown tree is so strong! Brown is the color of earth and wood!
Look at the fluffy white clouds! White is clean and pure!
The black night sky is full of stars! Black is the color of darkness!
A rainbow has all the colors! Can you name them all?
Red, blue, green, yellow, and more! Colors are everywhere! Which is your favorite?
